hero.subtitle: Have questions? We'd love to hear from you. Send us a message and we'll respond as soon as possible.

form.title: Send us a Message
form.description: Fill out the form below and our team will get back to you within 24 hours.

placeholders.name: John Doe
placeholders.subject: How can we help?
placeholders.message: Tell us more about your inquiry...

status.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
status.success: Thank you! We will get back to you soon.
status.serverUnreachable: Could not reach the server. If you are developing locally, run the API with npm run server.

items.question: How quickly can I book a service?
items.answer: You can book a service instantly through our app. Most services are available same-day or within 24 hours.

items.question: Are your service providers insured?
items.answer: Yes, all our service providers are fully insured and background-checked for your peace of mind.

items.question: What areas do you serve?
items.answer: We currently serve major metropolitan areas. Check the app for availability in your specific location.

items.question: Can I cancel or reschedule a booking?
items.answer: Yes, you can cancel or reschedule up to 24 hours before your appointment through the app.

downloadCta.title: Prefer to use the app?
downloadCta.text: Get instant support through our mobile app
